textByHash.02dd23ac4a1413f6850d0f9e7233476ace5c4b67: Good! And don't forget to close the door behind you!
textByHash.074e2a4041b9d59a4084e53bbc44c6ca0dd9cc4a: You could actually refer to fairies as magic embodied and not be wrong.
textByHash.1ab560c2cedb42fb679b5dfefdf142005c804430: Well, I can't diagnose the problem without knowing the symptoms. You'd better go and find that list, or get Fairy Nuff to give you another one.
textByHash.21687e5533db3a5af3fd981a530101f6cf8bd2e6: And why should I help you, fool? You attack my brethren and I, and then you demand my help! I think not!
textByHash.227b9f0393e1995b90b46c9b0ddc9fdce6cf7aa6: From what I know about fairies, their basic lifeforce is pure magic. Much as we humans would refer to our souls as our life essence, so too does a fairy have a life essence of pure magic.
textByHash.303e2c408f57f4276f7676e936480aac6970d36e: He's rumoured to have been seen near Port Sarim with his followers recently. Rumour has it that he's working on a spell that has something to do with fungus!
textByHash.312f354547d3c604552d67474aa2dd98645205fd: You should probably ask him for advice on how to combat it.
textByHash.3772e85e6d9b9af129e04a006206fdc8119431e3: Although why she would do that is beyond me.
textByHash.3c037b965ff6886f05dcb40921d2ae25105bb6b8: You think the Tanglefoot is responsible? I don't see how that could be. A Tanglefoot will normally kill its victim outright...unless...hmmmm...I wonder...
textByHash.8021e0cc0a2b427b6b9f9f2a2d1598cb55caa89a: My name is Zandar Horfyre, and you are trespassing in my tower, not to mention attacking my students! I thank you to leave immediately!
textByHash.953e67a187cfdff73f094782427bf6c89cdfaa34: Yes, but if I were you I would seek out a necromancer by the name of Malignus Mortifer. I believe that he once fought a Tanglefoot, many years ago.
textByHash.9f697c6a403512fb6a0c73651ec4316bf3e8da89: Actually, that wasn't an invitation. I've tried being polite, now we'll do it the hard way!
textByHash.a68353b5552fc2191dced470d0d076c0dda23a3e: Patience, I'm getting to that. It appears the Fairy Queen has lost a large part, indeed the majority, of her life essence. Either it was drained from her by the Tanglefoot or she did it voluntarily.
textByHash.b5d4571c9f079c795ef13d8fab12820ff9266b91: Hmm...yes...slow discorporation of ethreal body, eh? Hmm...I think I know what the problem might be.
textByHash.bdbf9fc915f059d9d00978a05765151ea66d7625: Don't mention it, and give my regards to Nuff, when you see her next.
